case_title: BOSCHETTI, G. PAUL vs. SANTOS, TESSIE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $125.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOSCHETTI, G. PAUL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANTOS, TESSIE BEAUCHAMP, MICHAEL SUED AS DOE 1 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 326 EDDY ST, #501 $1,550.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,550.00, LEASE FORFEITED

RM 501 JAMES MCBRIDE, JUDGE, CLACY, CLERK, S NAYLOR, CSR CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. GUADALUPE GAMINO FOR PLF. NO APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S DIRECT EXAMINATION OF WITNESSES AND INTRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF RESTS. COURT RENDERS JUDGMENT, DETAILS IN CLERK'S MINTUES AND ON RECORD. EXHIBITS RETURNED.
